nasb.text: “Thus you shall do to Aaron and to his sons, according to all that I have commanded you; you shall ordain them through seven days.

esv.text: “Thus you shall do to Aaron and to his sons, according to all that I have commanded you. Through seven days shall you ordain them,

cnv.text: “這樣，你要照我吩咐你的，向亞倫和他的兒子行接受聖職的禮七天。

ccb.text: “你要照我的吩咐，为亚伦父子们举行授圣职礼，历时七天。
